svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Serverless API Architecture" id="serverless-api"> <mxGraphModel dx="-604" dy="-237" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="800" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;" value="AWS Cloud" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="660" width="1040" x="80" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="region" parent="aws-cloud" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_region;strokeColor=#00A4A6;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#147EBA;dashed=1;" value="Region" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="960" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api-gateway" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.api_gateway;" value="Amazon API Gateway
(Regional, X-Ray)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="120" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lambda-fn" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda_function;" value="Lambda Function
Python 3.13 ARM64
Reserved Concurrency: 10" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="360" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iam-role" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.role;" value="IAM Role
(Least Privilege)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="60" x="360" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dynamodb" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.dynamodb;" value="DynamoDB Table
PAY_PER_REQUEST
Encrypted, PITR, Streams" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="600" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloudwatch-logs" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#759C3E;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch_2;" value="CloudWatch Logs
(7 days retention)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="600" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ddb-streams" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.kinesis_data_streams;" value="DynamoDB Streams
(NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="820" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-api-lambda" edge="1" parent="region" source="api-gateway" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="lambda-fn" value="Invoke (AWS_PROXY)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-ddb" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-fn" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="dynamodb" value="Read/Write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-cw" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-fn" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cloudwatch-logs" value="Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-ddb-streams" edge="1" parent="region" source="dynamodb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#C925D1;fontSize=11;" target="ddb-streams" value="Stream"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-iam-lambda" edge="1" parent="region" source="iam-role" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#DD344C;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="lambda-fn" value="Attached"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-api-cw" edge="1" parent="region" source="api-gateway" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cloudwatch-logs" value="Metrics & Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note-arch" parent="region" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F2FF;strokeColor=#0066CC;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Architecture Highlights:
- REST API (REGIONAL endpoint)
- Lambda ARM64 (cost-optimized)
- DynamoDB PITR (7-day backup)
- X-Ray tracing enabled
- CloudWatch metrics & logs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="280" x="120" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api-client" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#232F3D;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.user;" value="API Client" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="40" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-client-api" edge="1" parent="1" source="api-client" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="api-gateway" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Architecture Highlights:
- REST API (REGIONAL endpoint)
- Lambda ARM64 (cost-optimized)
- DynamoDB PITR (7-day backup)
- X-Ray tracing enabled
- CloudWatch metrics & logs
